summary: Ran backend pytest regression plus mobile-first Expo web validation for new waveform and 3D/rotation features. All requested functional flows passed on the public preview URL.

issues: Wave type chips are below 44x44 minimum touch target (40px default, 34px compact), which is not ideal for mobile accessibility.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning indicates useNativeDriver falls back to JS on web preview.
Console warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated; should migrate to style.pointerEvents.

action_items: Increase wave picker touch targets to at least 44x44 on mobile.
Optionally clean up web preview warnings (pointerEvents + useNativeDriver fallback).
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py is very large (>700 lines); split into focused modules (routes/services/models) to reduce regression risk.
Several interactive controls outside tested flows still lack explicit testID coverage; add testID consistently for long-term UI automation stability.
seed_data_creation: Voice suggestion flow triggered chat reminder and created test task data in tasks collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public preview was reachable during this run; historical Expo/ngrok tunnel instability is visible in supervisor logs but did not block current execution.
rca_of_issue: No blocking defects found in requested scope. Prior pytest failure root cause was test env URL not loaded in shell; fixed in test fixture by reading frontend/.env fallback.
test_credentials: File /app/memory/test_credentials.md exists but is empty. No auth flow was part of this test scope.
